attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
                    XAAS.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
                    XAAS.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
                    XAAS.BOOK_SOURCE,
                    XAAS.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
                    XAAS.ORDER_NUMBER, 
                    XAAS.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
                    XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
                    XAAS.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
                    XAAS.PARTY_ID,
                    XAAS.SAV_ID,
                    XAAS.SPLIT,
                    XAAS.DNR_FLAG,
                    XAAS.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
                    XAAS.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
                    XAAS.APPROVED_BY,
                    XAAS.APPROVED_DTM,
                    XAAS.UPLOADED_BY,
                    XAAS.UPLOADED_DTM,
                    XAAS.FILE_NAME,
                    XAAS.REASON_DESCR,
                    XAAS.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
                    XAAS.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
                    XAAS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
                    XAAS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
                    XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
                    XAAS.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
                    CASE WHEN OREPLACE(XAAS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
                    XAAS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
                    XAAS.FILE_NUM_INT,
					XAAS.DEAL_ID,
					XAAS.NEW_AGENT_NUM
 FROM 
 ( 
 SELECT 
         WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
                                 WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
                                 WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
                                 WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
                                 WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
                                 -9999 AS ORDER_LINE_ID, 
                                 WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
                                 WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
                                 WI.PARTY_ID,
                                 WI.SAV_ID,
                                 WI.SPLIT,
                                 WI.DNR_FLAG,
                                 WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
                                 WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
                                 WI.APPROVED_BY,
                                 WI.APPROVED_DTM,
                                 WI.UPLOADED_BY,
                                 WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
                                 WI.FILE_NAME,
                                 WI.REASON_DESCR,
                                 WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
								 WI.DEAL_ID,
								 WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
                                 -9999 AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
                                 -9999 AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
                                 -9999 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
                                 -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
                                 COALESCE( NXAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, -999 ) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
                                 -1 AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
                                CASE WHEN WI.ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL 
                                                  THEN 'INVALID ORDER NUMBER' 
                                                  ELSE ',' 
                                   END VALIDATION_1,
                                 CASE WHEN WI.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL AND NXAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT IS NULL 
                                                  THEN 'INVALID ORDER LINE ID'  
                                                  ELSE ','
                                 END AS VALIDATION_2,
                                 CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(WI.ORDER_NUMBER,-9999) < 0 AND COALESCE(WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,-9999) < 0 ) 
                                                  THEN 'INVALID ORDER LINE ID'  
                                                  ELSE ','
                                 END AS VALIDATION_3,
                                 CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL 
                                                  THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
                                                  ELSE ',' 
                                   END VALIDATION_4 ,
 CASE WHEN (BKGS.SK_TRX_ID_INT IS NULL  AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL)THEN 'NO SUCH COMBINATION OF ORDER NUMBER AND TERRITORY IN BOOKINGS' 
 ELSE ','
 END VALIDATION_5,
CASE WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
         WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
         WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
	    	 ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_6 ,
CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM<>'-999' AND REP.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'INVALID AGENT ID OR AGENT IS NOT ACTIVE As on EFFECTIVE_DATE'  ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_7 ,	 
     TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3||','|| VALIDATION_4||','||VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_6||','||VALIDATION_7,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) VALIDATION_COMMENTS
 FROM 
    ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 
                   WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'XAAS' 
                                    AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'  AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE<>'EXPIRE'
                 ) WI 
                 /* removed the validation to check for ORDER_NUMBER as part of OCt31st*/
   /* LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BK_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX 
                                                                    UNION 
                                                    SELECT FCM_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX 
                                                   ) NXAAS_ORD
        ON WI.ORDER_NUMBER = NXAAS_ORD.BK_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT*/
    LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX NXAAS
        ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID = NXAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
        ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
       AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
                   LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1
         ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
         AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'
		 /* Added part of May release */
	---start
	LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
	AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.START_TV_DATE AND RSHCT.END_TV_DATE
	--AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )
     ---end
	 LEFT JOIN ( sel count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1		
      LEFT JOIN (SELECT XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT, BOOKINGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,BOOKINGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT FROM
                   (SELECT DISTINCT ORDER_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'XAAS' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS')WI
                     INNER JOIN   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX XAAS
                                   ON XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID
                    INNER JOIN (SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='XAAS') BOOKINGS
         ON BOOKINGS.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY         
                   GROUP BY 1,2,3
                   ) BKGS
                 ON  BKGS.SK_TRX_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID 
 AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND
 WI.ORDER_NUMBER=BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT
  LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT DV_DEAL_ID FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='XAAS') BOOKINGS 
         ON BOOKINGS.DV_DEAL_ID = WI.DEAL_ID 
   /* Agent ID Validation */
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP REP
        ON REP.SALES_REP_NUM = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN REP.sales_rep_active_start_dt AND COALESCE( REP.sales_rep_active_end_dt, DATE '3500-01-01' ) 
    ) XAAS
	
	
UNION ALL

SELECT 
                    XAAS.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
                    XAAS.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
                    XAAS.BOOK_SOURCE,
                    XAAS.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
                    XAAS.ORDER_NUMBER, 
                    XAAS.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
                    XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
                    XAAS.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
                    XAAS.PARTY_ID,
                    XAAS.SAV_ID,
                    XAAS.SPLIT,
                    XAAS.DNR_FLAG,
                    XAAS.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
                    XAAS.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
                    XAAS.APPROVED_BY,
                    XAAS.APPROVED_DTM,
                    XAAS.UPLOADED_BY,
                    XAAS.UPLOADED_DTM,
                    XAAS.FILE_NAME,
                    XAAS.REASON_DESCR,
                    XAAS.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
                    XAAS.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
                    XAAS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
                    XAAS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
                    XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
                    XAAS.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
                    CASE WHEN OREPLACE(XAAS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
                    XAAS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
                    XAAS.FILE_NUM_INT,
					XAAS.DEAL_ID,
					XAAS.NEW_AGENT_NUM
 FROM 
 ( 
 SELECT 
         WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
                                 WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
                                 WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
                                 WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
                                 WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
                                 -9999 AS ORDER_LINE_ID, 
                                 WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
                                 WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
                                 WI.PARTY_ID,
                                 WI.SAV_ID,
                                 WI.SPLIT,
                                 WI.DNR_FLAG,
                                 WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
                                 WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
                                 WI.APPROVED_BY,
                                 WI.APPROVED_DTM,
                                 WI.UPLOADED_BY,
                                 WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
                                 WI.FILE_NAME,
                                 WI.REASON_DESCR,
                                 WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
								 WI.DEAL_ID,
								 WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
                                 -9999 AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
                                 -9999 AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
                                 -9999 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
                                 -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
                                 COALESCE( NXAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, -999 ) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
                                 -1 AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
								 SUM(SPLIT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,
								      WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,COALESCE(WI.PARTY_ID,-9999) ) SUM_SPLIT,
								CASE WHEN SUM_SPLIT <> 100 THEN 'SPLIT SUM NOT EQUAL 100' ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_1,
	                            CASE WHEN ND.DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY IS NULL THEN 'NO QUALIFIED RECORDS IN ADJUSTMENT TABLE TO EXPIRE' 
	                                      ELSE ','  END AS VALIDATION_2 ,
								TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) AS VALIDATION_COMMENTS
 
 FROM 
    ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 
                   WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'XAAS' 
                                    AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'  AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE = 'EXPIRE'
                 ) WI 
    LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX NXAAS
        ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID = NXAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
        ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
    LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY 
					UNION 
					SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	          	    ) RSH1
        ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
       ON NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = WI.PARTY_ID 	 
     LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SAV_PARTY SAV
      ON WI.SAV_ID = SAV.BK_SALES_ACCOUNT_ID_INT
    LEFT JOIN (sel SO_SUBSCR_ITEM_SALES_TRX_KEY,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY,RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY,BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD,SALES_REP_NUM,CUST_PRTY_KEY,
	                     SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT,MAX(DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY) DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY
	                from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT 
					where EXPiration_dt>=CURRENT_DATE and BK_EFFECTIVE_DT<expiration_dt
					group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 ) ND
     ON  ND.SO_SUBSCR_ITEM_SALES_TRX_KEY =  NXAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
	AND ND.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	AND ND.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY = COALESCE(RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)
	AND ND.BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD = WI.BOOK_SOURCE 
	AND ND.SALES_REP_NUM = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
	AND ND.CUST_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-9999)
	AND ND.SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(SAV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)
	AND ND.BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT = WI.SPLIT
	
		) XAAS

SELECT
   SLS_ADJ.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   SLS_ADJ.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   SLS_ADJ.BOOK_SOURCE,
   SLS_ADJ.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   SLS_ADJ.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   SLS_ADJ.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   SLS_ADJ.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
   SLS_ADJ.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   SLS_ADJ.PARTY_ID,
   SLS_ADJ.SAV_ID,
   SLS_ADJ.SPLIT,
   SLS_ADJ.DNR_FLAG,
   SLS_ADJ.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   SLS_ADJ.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   SLS_ADJ.APPROVED_BY,
   SLS_ADJ.APPROVED_DTM,
   SLS_ADJ.UPLOADED_BY,
   SLS_ADJ.UPLOADED_DTM,
   SLS_ADJ.FILE_NAME,
   SLS_ADJ.REASON_DESCR,
   SLS_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   SLS_ADJ.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   SLS_ADJ.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   SLS_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   SLS_ADJ.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   SLS_ADJ.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN OREPLACE(SLS_ADJ.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
   SLS_ADJ.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
   SLS_ADJ.FILE_NUM_INT,
   SLS_ADJ.DEAL_ID,
   SLS_ADJ.NEW_AGENT_NUM
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
      WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT) AS ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
   CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT ) AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT ) AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
   CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   COALESCE(NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,-9999 ) AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,
   CAST(-999 AS BIGINT ) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   CAST(-1 AS BIGINT ) AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN WI.ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL THEN 'INVALID ORDER NUMBER' 
     ELSE ','
    END VALIDATION_1,  
   CASE WHEN NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT IS NULL  
        THEN 'INVALID ORDER LINE ID' 
        ELSE ','
    END AS VALIDATION_2,
   CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_3 ,
   CASE WHEN (BKGS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT IS NULL   AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL) THEN 'NO SUCH COMBINATION OF ORDER NUMBER AND TERRITORY IN BOOKINGS' 
 ELSE ','
 END VALIDATION_4,
 CASE WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
          WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
          WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
       	  ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_5 ,
  CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM<>'-999' AND REP.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'INVALID AGENT ID OR AGENT IS NOT ACTIVE As on EFFECTIVE_DATE'  ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_6 ,
  TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3||','||VALIDATION_4||','||VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_6,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) AS VALIDATION_COMMENTS
  FROM 
     ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'SLS_ADJ' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'
          AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE <> 'EXPIRE'	 ) WI 
        LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSA
             ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID = NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
   /*LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_LINT AS ORDER_NUMBER 
                 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE 
          GROUP BY 1 ) NSA_ORD
       ON WI.ORDER_NUMBER = NSA_ORD.ORDER_NUMBER*/
         LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
    ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE   
    AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
       LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1
         ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
         AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'
	/* Added part of May release */
	---start
	LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
	AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.START_TV_DATE AND RSHCT.END_TV_DATE
	--AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )
     ---end
	 LEFT JOIN ( sel count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1		
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,BOOKINGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT FROM
 (SELECT DISTINCT ORDER_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'SLS_ADJ' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS')WI
  INNER JOIN (SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT, BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='SLS_ADJ')BOOKINGS 
    ON BOOKINGS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
    ) BKGS

     LEFT JOIN (sel BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY,RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY,BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD,SALES_REP_NUM,CUST_PRTY_KEY,

	                from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT

	   AND ND.SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(SAV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)
	   AND ND.BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT = WI.SPLIT

   WI.SAV_ID,

   WI.APPROVED_DTM,

   -9999 AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,

     ELSE ','
    END AS VALIDATION_2,
   CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_3 ,
 CASE WHEN (BKGS.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS NULL AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL) THEN 'NO SUCH COMBINATION OF ORDER NUMBER AND TERRITORY IN BOOKINGS' 
 ELSE ','
 END VALIDATION_4,
CASE WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
         WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
         WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
          ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_5 ,
CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM<>'-999' AND REP.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'INVALID AGENT ID OR AGENT IS NOT ACTIVE As on EFFECTIVE_DATE'  ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_6 ,	 
     TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3||','||VALIDATION_4||','||VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_6,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) AS VALIDATION_COMMENTS
  FROM 
     ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'AR' AND BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE = 'AR' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'

           ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
           AND SS_CODE = 'CG'
         LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
           ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
           AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
     LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1
         ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
         AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'
	/* Added part of May release */
	---start
	LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'

     ---end
	 LEFT JOIN ( select count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1		
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT AR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT, BOOKINGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,BOOKINGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT FROM
    (SELECT DISTINCT ORDER_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'AR' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS')WI
    INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE AR

    INNER JOIN (SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='AR') BOOKINGS
    ON BOOKINGS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = AR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
         GROUP BY 1,2,3
    ) BKGS
  ON  BKGS.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID 
 AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND

  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP REP

AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN REP.sales_rep_active_start_dt AND COALESCE( REP.sales_rep_active_end_dt, DATE '3500-01-01' ) 
      ) AR

	AND ND.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	AND ND.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY = COALESCE(RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)
	AND ND.BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD = WI.BOOK_SOURCE 
	AND ND.SALES_REP_NUM = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
	AND ND.CUST_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-9999)
	AND ND.SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(SAV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)

	  ) AR

SELECT  
    ERP.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,  
    ERP.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
    ERP.BOOK_SOURCE,
    ERP.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
    ERP.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   COALESCE(ERP.ORDER_LINE_ID, -9999),
    ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
    ERP.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
    ERP.PARTY_ID,
    ERP.SAV_ID,
    ERP.SPLIT,
    ERP.DNR_FLAG,
    ERP.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
    ERP.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
    ERP.APPROVED_BY,
    ERP.APPROVED_DTM,
    ERP.UPLOADED_BY,
    ERP.UPLOADED_DTM,
    ERP.FILE_NAME,
    ERP.REASON_DESCR,
    ERP.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
    ERP.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    ERP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    ERP.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
    ERP.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
    ERP.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN OREPLACE(ERP.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED' END AS STATUS ,
    ERP.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
    ERP.FILE_NUM_INT,
   ERP.DEAL_ID,
   ERP.NEW_AGENT_NUM
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
     WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
     WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
     WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
     WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
     WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
     WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,
     WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
     WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
     WI.PARTY_ID,
     WI.SAV_ID,
     WI.SPLIT,
     WI.DNR_FLAG,
     WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
     WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
     WI.APPROVED_BY,
     WI.APPROVED_DTM,
     WI.UPLOADED_BY,
     WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
     WI.FILE_NAME,
     WI.REASON_DESCR,
  WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
  WI.DEAL_ID,
  WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
  -9999 AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
     -9999 AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
     -9999 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
     -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
     -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
     -1 AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(WI.ORDER_NUMBER,-9999) < 0 THEN 'INVALID ORDER NUMBER' 
       WHEN NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NULL THEN 'INVALID ORDER NUMBER' 
    ELSE ',' 
    END AS VALIDATION_1 ,
     CASE WHEN ( WI.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL AND NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NULL ) 
    THEN 'INVALID ORDER LINE ID' 
    ELSE ',' 
    END VALIDATION_2 ,
    CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_3 ,
 CASE WHEN (BKGS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  IS NULL AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL) THEN 'NO SUCH COMBINATION OF ORDER NUMBER AND TERRITORY IN BOOKINGS' 
 ELSE ','
 END  VALIDATION_4,
 CASE WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
          WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
	      WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
	  ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_5 ,
 CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM<>'-999' AND REP.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'INVALID AGENT ID OR AGENT IS NOT ACTIVE As on EFFECTIVE_DATE'  ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_6 ,
    TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3||','||VALIDATION_4||','||VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_6,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) AS VALIDATION_COMMENTS
  FROM 
     ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'ERP' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'  
	     AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE<>'EXPIRE') WI 
              LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
         ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
		 AND NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = WI.ORDER_NUMBER
         AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
      LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
         ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
         AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
   LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1
         ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
         AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
		 
	/* Added part of May release */
	---start
	LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
	AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.START_TV_DATE AND RSHCT.END_TV_DATE
	--AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )
     ---end
	 LEFT JOIN ( sel count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1		
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT   NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT, BOOKINGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,BOOKINGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT
   FROM  (SELECT DISTINCT ORDER_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'ERP' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS')WIA
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
  ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = WIA.ORDER_LINE_ID
   INNER JOIN    ( SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='ERP') BOOKINGS 
         ON BOOKINGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
    group by 1,2,3
    ) BKGS 
    ON BKGS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID 
 AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   AND
 WI.ORDER_NUMBER=BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT
  LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT DV_DEAL_ID FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='ERP') BOOKINGS 
         ON BOOKINGS.DV_DEAL_ID = WI.DEAL_ID  
  /* Agent ID Validation */
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP REP
        ON REP.SALES_REP_NUM = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN REP.sales_rep_active_start_dt AND COALESCE( REP.sales_rep_active_end_dt, DATE '3500-01-01' ) 
      ) ERP
	  
UNION ALL

 SELECT 
         WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   -9999 AS ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
   -9999 AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   -9999 AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
   -9999 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   COALESCE( RT.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,-1) AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
  SUM(SPLIT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,
								      WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,COALESCE(WI.PARTY_ID,-9999) ) SUM_SPLIT,
  CASE WHEN SUM_SPLIT <> 100 THEN 'SPLIT SUM NOT EQUAL 100' ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_1,
  CASE WHEN ND.DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY IS NULL THEN 'NO QUALIFIED RECORDS IN ADJUSTMENT TABLE TO EXPIRE' 
	                                      ELSE ','  END AS VALIDATION_2 ,
  TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) AS VALIDATION_COMMENTS 
 FROM 
     ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'AR'  AND BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE = 'RTE' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS' 
	    AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE = 'EXPIRE'
	 ) WI 
       LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER RT
          ON WI.ORDER_LINE_ID = RT.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT
       LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
          ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
       LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY 
						UNION
						SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV
	                  ) RSH1
         ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
      LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
	     ON NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = WI.PARTY_ID 	 
     LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SAV_PARTY SAV
	 ON WI.SAV_ID = SAV.BK_SALES_ACCOUNT_ID_INT
     LEFT JOIN (sel REV_TRANSFER_KEY,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY,RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY,BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD,SALES_REP_NUM,CUST_PRTY_KEY,
	                     SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT,MAX(DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY) DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY
	                from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT 
					where EXPiration_dt>=CURRENT_DATE and BK_EFFECTIVE_DT<expiration_dt
					group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 ) ND
     ON  ND.REV_TRANSFER_KEY =  RT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  
	 AND ND.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	 AND ND.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY = COALESCE(RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)
	 AND ND.BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD = WI.BOOK_SOURCE 
	 AND ND.SALES_REP_NUM = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
	 AND ND.CUST_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-9999)
	 AND ND.SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(SAV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)
	 AND ND.BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT = WI.SPLIT
	 
	  ) AR_RT

     POS.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
     POS.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
     POS.APPROVED_BY,
     POS.APPROVED_DTM,
     POS.UPLOADED_BY,
     POS.UPLOADED_DTM,
     POS.FILE_NAME,
     POS.REASON_DESCR,
     POS.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
     POS.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
     POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
     POS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
     POS.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
     POS.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
     CASE WHEN OREPLACE(POS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
     POS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
     POS.FILE_NUM_INT,
     POS.DEAL_ID,
	 POS.NEW_AGENT_NUM
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   -9999 AS ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
   -9999 AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
    COALESCE( DSV_H.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT , POS_H.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.ORDER_NUMBER, -9999 ) AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
    COALESCE( DSV_L.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , POS_L.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, -9999 ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   -1 AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE = 'DSV' AND WI.ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL THEN 'INVALID ORDER NUMBER' 
     WHEN BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE = 'POS' AND WI.ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL THEN 'INVALID ORDER NUMBER' 
     ELSE ','
     END VALIDATION_1,
   CASE WHEN BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE = 'DSV' AND WI.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID ORDER LINE ID' 
     WHEN BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE = 'DSV' AND WI.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL AND DSV_L.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'INVALID ORDER LINE ID'
     WHEN BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE = 'POS' AND WI.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL AND POS_L.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'INVALID ORDER LINE ID'
     ELSE ','
    END AS VALIDATION_2,
   CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(WI.ORDER_NUMBER,-9999) < 0 AND COALESCE(WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,-9999) < 0) THEN 'INVALID ORDER_NUMBER , ORDER_LINE_ID'
     ELSE ','
    END AS VALIDATION_3,   
   CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_4 ,
  CASE WHEN (BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  IS NULL AND BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL) THEN 'NO SUCH COMBINATION OF ORDER NUMBER AND TERRITORY IN BOOKINGS' 
 ELSE ','
 END VALIDATION_5,
 CASE WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
          WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
	      WHEN (WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL ) THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
    	   ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_6 ,
 CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM<>'-999' AND REP.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'INVALID AGENT ID OR AGENT IS NOT ACTIVE As on EFFECTIVE_DATE'  ELSE ',' END VALIDATION_7 ,
 TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3||','|| VALIDATION_4||','||VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_6||','||VALIDATION_7,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) VALIDATION_COMMENTS
  FROM 
       ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'POS' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'  AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE<>'EXPIRE') WI 
         LEFT JOIN (SELECT BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE  GROUP BY 1) DSV_H
           ON DSV_H.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_NUMBER
         LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE DSV_L
           ON DSV_L.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID
         LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_H
           ON POS_H.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_NUMBER
         LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_L
           ON POS_L.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID
         LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
           ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
           AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
     LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1
         ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
         AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'
/* Added part of May release */
	---start
	LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
	AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.START_TV_DATE AND RSHCT.END_TV_DATE
	--AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )  
     ---end
	 LEFT JOIN ( sel count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1		
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT BOOKINGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, BOOKINGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,BOOKINGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT FROM 
 (SELECT DISTINCT ORDER_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'POS' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS')WI
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS') BOOKINGS 
   ON BOOKINGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
    ) BKGS
  ON  BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WI.ORDER_LINE_ID 
 AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY and
 WI.ORDER_NUMBER=BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT
 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT DV_DEAL_ID FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS') BOOKINGS 
         ON BOOKINGS.DV_DEAL_ID = WI.DEAL_ID 
 /* Agent ID Validation */
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP REP
        ON REP.SALES_REP_NUM = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM 	
AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN REP.sales_rep_active_start_dt AND COALESCE( REP.sales_rep_active_end_dt, DATE '3500-01-01' ) 	 
       ) POS
	   
UNION ALL

SELECT  
     POS.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
     POS.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
     POS.BOOK_SOURCE,
     POS.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
     POS.ORDER_NUMBER, 
     POS.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
     POS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
     POS.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
     POS.PARTY_ID,
     POS.SAV_ID,
     POS.SPLIT,
     POS.DNR_FLAG,
     POS.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
     POS.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
     POS.APPROVED_BY,
     POS.APPROVED_DTM,
     POS.UPLOADED_BY,
     POS.UPLOADED_DTM,
     POS.FILE_NAME,
     POS.REASON_DESCR,
     POS.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
     POS.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
     POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
     POS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
     POS.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
     POS.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
     CASE WHEN OREPLACE(POS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
     POS.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
     POS.FILE_NUM_INT,
     POS.DEAL_ID,
	 POS.NEW_AGENT_NUM
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   -9999 AS ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
   -9999 AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
    COALESCE( WI.ORDER_NUMBER, -9999 ) AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
    COALESCE( WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, -9999 ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   -1 AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   SUM(SPLIT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,
           WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,COALESCE(WI.PARTY_ID,-9999) ) SUM_SPLIT,
	 CASE WHEN SUM_SPLIT <> 100 THEN 'SPLIT SUM NOT EQUAL 100' ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_1,
	 CASE WHEN ND.DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY IS NULL THEN 'NO QUALIFIED RECORDS IN ADJUSTMENT TABLE TO EXPIRE' 
	   ELSE ','  END AS VALIDATION_2 ,
     TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) AS VALIDATION_COMMENTS
  FROM 
       ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_1 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE = 'POS' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS' 
      	   AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE = 'EXPIRE'  ) WI 
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
           ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
    LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY 
						UNION 
					 SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	 	         ) RSH1
         ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
       
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
       ON NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = WI.PARTY_ID 	 
     LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SAV_PARTY SAV
      ON WI.SAV_ID = SAV.BK_SALES_ACCOUNT_ID_INT 
    LEFT JOIN (sel BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY,RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY,BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD,SALES_REP_NUM,CUST_PRTY_KEY,
	                     SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT,MAX(DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY) DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY
	                from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT 
					where EXPiration_dt>=CURRENT_DATE and BK_EFFECTIVE_DT<expiration_dt
					group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 ) ND
     ON  ND.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT =  WI.ORDER_LINE_ID
	AND ND.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	AND ND.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY = COALESCE(RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)
	AND ND.BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD = WI.BOOK_SOURCE 
	AND ND.SALES_REP_NUM = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
	AND ND.CUST_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-9999)
	AND ND.SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY = COALESCE(SAV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)
	AND ND.BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT = WI.SPLIT
	 
       ) POS
